mapper.sql: t.id, t.task_id, t.enterprise_id, t.audit_year, t.item_name, t.requirement, t.status, t.deadline, t.complete_time, t.result, t.create_by, t.create_time, t.update_by, t.update_time, t.deleted
mapper.select: SELECT , e.enterprise_name AS enterprise_name, at.task_title AS task_title FROM aw_rectification_track t LEFT JOIN ent_enterprise e ON e.id = t.enterprise_id AND e.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN aw_audit_task at ON at.id = t.task_id AND at.deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0

SELECT , e.enterprise_name AS enterprise_name, at.task_title AS task_title FROM aw_rectification_track t LEFT JOIN ent_enterprise e ON e.id = t.enterprise_id AND e.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN aw_audit_task at ON at.id = t.task_id AND at.deleted = 0 WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId} AND t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT , e.enterprise_name AS enterprise_name, at.task_title AS task_title FROM aw_rectification_track t LEFT JOIN ent_enterprise e ON e.id = t.enterprise_id AND e.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN aw_audit_task at ON at.id = t.task_id AND at.deleted = 0 WHERE t.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} AND t.deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.status = 3 THEN 0 WHEN t.status = 0 THEN 1 WHEN t.status = 1 THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, t.deadline ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM aw_rectification_track WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 3 AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM aw_rectification_track t WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.status IN (0, 1) AND t.deadline IS NOT NULL AND t.deadline < NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO aw_rectification_track (task_id, enterprise_id, audit_year, item_name, requirement, status, deadline, result, create_by) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{enterpriseId}, #{auditYear}, #{itemName}, #{requirement}, #{status}, #{deadline}, #{result}, #{createBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE aw_rectification_track
update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, status = #{status}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, result = #{result}, item_name = #{itemName}, requirement = #{requirement}, deadline = #{deadline},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
